arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford at TURNING POINT in Man Utd career
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford at TURNING POINT in Man Utd career He's on pace to beat last season's miserable total of 8 goals in 43 games, but he looks miles away from two years ago when he scored 30 times in 56 appearances for Man Utd.

arts.ttl: Bayern to battle Manchester United in chase for left-back
arts.sum: Bayern Munich remain interested in a deal to sign Theo Hernández from AC Milan as the club prepare for Alphonso Davies to depart. Hernandez is the top target of the Bundesliga side to replace Davies, whose current contract expires in the summer. The latter is expected to leave on a free transfer with no breakthrough […] The post Bayern to battle Manchester United in chase for left-back first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Why Man City, Liverpool and Manchester United fans are joining forces in protest
arts.sum: On a weekend where rivalries will be at their highest and teams have plenty to play for, fans of Manchester City, Man United and Liverpool will temporarily come together on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Amad and Casemiro drop early Man United team news hint as Ruben Amorim confirms changes

arts.sum: Barry Hearn has made plenty of money through his catalogue of sports investments - but he has advised the Glazer family against one idea the Americans are reportedly considering

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim moves Man United a step closer to £67m January transfer window signing
arts.sum: Manchester United’s move to hire Ruben Amorim as manager reportedly looks to have put them in a stronger position to sign Sporting Lisbon midfielder Morten Hjulmand. The Denmark international has a £67million release clause in his contract at Sporting, and it seems Man Utd may now have the edge over rivals Man City in the […] The post Ruben Amorim moves Man United a step closer to £67m January transfer window signing appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim's impressive net worth, Man Utd contract details, relationship with wife
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will step into the Old Trafford dugout for the first time tonight since signing a two-and-a-half year deal to become the Red Devils' new head coach

arts.ttl: Rival fans at Old Trafford and Anfield to unite in protests against ticket prices
arts.sum: Fans to come together at Sunday’s Premier League games Manchester United raised members’ ticket prices to £66 Manchester United, Everton, Liverpool and Manchester City fans will hold joint protests against rising ticket prices on Sunday as part of the Football Supporters’ Association’s Stop Exploiting Loyalty campaign. The action will take place before United host Everton at 1.30pm and Liverpool face City at 4.30pm. At Old Trafford’s trinity statue the United fan group FC58, Everton supporters and Fans Supporting Foodbanks representatives will display a Stop Exploiting Loyalty banner. This will be mirrored at Anfield, where from 3pm the Spirit of Shankly group and Liverpool fans will gather by the Fans Supporting Foodbanks collection point with the City 1894 group and MCFC Fans Foodbank Support. arts.ttl: Man United supporters send letter to Omar Berrada slamming 'disgraceful' ticket price changes
arts.sum: Man United find themselves under pressure from supporters after the club recently announced a hike in ticket prices for the rest of the season.
